basic_details.job_title: Sainik School Kalikiri Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for PGT and TGT Posts
basic_details.short_information: Sainik School Kalikiri has released an official notification for the recruitment of 5 PGT and TGT Posts. Interested and eligible candidates can apply Offline by sending the application form to the official address. The last date to submit the application is 02-06-2026.

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 21 years Maximum Age: 40 years Age relaxation rules are not specified in the provided data. Please refer to the official notification for details.

qualification.education_qualification: Integrated Post Graduate Course from NCTE recognised institution with B.Ed. component, Master Degree with B.Ed. from NCTE recognised institution, Three years integrated B.Ed. – M.Ed from NCTE recognised institution, Four years Integrated degree including B.Ed. component, Qualified in CTET Paper-II
qualification.details: PGT (English): Integrated Post Graduate Course from NCTE recognised institution in English with at least 50% marks including B.Ed. component OR Master Degree in English with 50% marks AND B.Ed. with 50% marks OR Three years integrated B.Ed. – M.Ed with 50% marks OR Four years Integrated degree with 50% marks including B.Ed. component. PGT (Mathematics): Integrated Post Graduate Course from NCTE recognised institution in Mathematics with at least 50% marks including B.Ed. component OR Master Degree in Mathematics with 50% marks AND B.Ed. with 50% marks OR Three years integrated B.Ed. – M.Ed with 50% marks OR Four years Integrated degree with 50% marks including B.Ed. component. TGT (Science): Four years integrated degree course from NCTE recognised institution with at least 50% marks in concerned subject including B.Ed. component OR Bachelors/Honours Degree with 50% marks and B.Ed. – M.Ed with 50% marks OR Post Graduation in Science with 55% marks and three years integrated B.Ed. – M.Ed with 50% marks; Qualified in CTET Paper-II. TGT (Mathematics): Four years integrated degree course from NCTE recognised institution with at least 50% marks in Mathematics including B.Ed. component OR Bachelors/Honours Degree with 50% marks in Mathematics and B.Ed. – M.Ed with 50% marks OR Post Graduation in Mathematics with 55% marks and three years integrated B.Ed. – M.Ed with 50% marks; Qualified in CTET Paper-II. TGT (English): Four years integrated degree course from NCTE recognised institution with at least 50% marks in English including B.Ed. component OR Bachelors/Honours Degree with 50% marks in English and B.Ed. – M.Ed with 50% marks OR Post Graduation in English with 55% marks and three years integrated B.Ed. – M.Ed with 50% marks; Qualified in CTET Paper-II.

selection_process: Walk-in Interview Classroom Demonstration Document Verification
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for Sainik School Kalikiri Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: https://sskal.ac.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 02-06-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for Sainik School Kalikiri Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for Sainik School Kalikiri PGT and TGT posts is 02 June 2026. Ensure your application reaches the designated address by this date.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for PGT and TGT posts?
faq.answer: There are a total of 5 vacancies announced for PGT and TGT positions at Sainik School Kalikiri. These include specific roles for PGT (English), PGT (Mathematics), TGT (Science), TGT (Mathematics), and TGT (English).

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the PGT posts?
faq.answer: For PGT posts, candidates need an Integrated Post Graduate Course or Master Degree with B.Ed. from an NCTE recognized institution, with at least 50% marks. Specific subject requirements apply.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for applying to these posts?
faq.answer: The age limit for all PGT and TGT posts is between 21 years and 40 years. Age relaxation details, if any, should be checked in the official notification.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application fee for Sainik School Kalikiri Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive. Candidates can apply without paying any fee.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary offered for the PGT and TGT positions?
faq.answer: The consolidated salary for PGT posts is Rs. 62,356/- per month, and for TGT posts, it is Rs. 58,819/- per month.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for these vacancies?
faq.answer: The selection process involves a Walk-in Interview, followed by a Classroom Demonstration and Document Verification. Candidates must perform well in all stages.

faq.question: Q8. How can I apply for the Sainik School Kalikiri Recruitment?
faq.answer: Applications must be submitted offline. Candidates need to download the application form, fill it correctly, attach necessary documents, and send it to the official address before the last date.

faq.question: Q9. What is the official website of Sainik School Kalikiri?
faq.answer: The official website of Sainik School Kalikiri is https://sskal.ac.in. Candidates can visit this site for more information and to download the application form.

faq.question: Q10. Are the posts contractual or permanent?
faq.answer: The job type for these PGT and TGT positions at Sainik School Kalikiri is contractual.
